testcase.name: test_hall_plus_chairs_math

failure.message: AssertionError: {'booking_id': '56e4ec24-ebe4-47ba-acd1-1c88c2950ce4', 'currency': 'XAF', 'line_items': [{'category': 'hall', 'hours': None, 'line_total': 100000.0, 'operator_id': None, ...}, {'category': 'rental_item', 'hours': None, 'line_total': 100000.0, 'operator_id': None, ...}], 'message': 'Event order created', ...} assert 210000.0 == 200000

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter208_banquet_cart_checkout.py:119: in test_hall_plus_chairs_math assert d["total_price"] == 200000, d E AssertionError: {'booking_id': '56e4ec24-ebe4-47ba-acd1-1c88c2950ce4', 'currency': 'XAF', 'line_items': [{'category': 'hall', 'hours': None, 'line_total': 100000.0, 'operator_id': None, ...}, {'category': 'rental_item', 'hours': None, 'line_total': 100000.0, 'operator_id': None, ...}], 'message': 'Event order created', ...} E assert 210000.0 == 200000

testcase.name: test_per_hour_with_hours_override
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter208_banquet_cart_checkout.py:144: in test_per_hour_with_hours_override assert d["total_price"] == 180000, d E AssertionError: {'booking_id': '949f3dc7-be26-4b96-a402-a04fb2cfacee', 'currency': 'XAF', 'line_items': [{'category': 'photographer', 'hours': 6.0, 'line_total': 180000.0, 'operator_id': None, ...}], 'message': 'Event order created', ...} E assert 189000.0 == 180000

testcase.name: test_package_plus_individual
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter208_banquet_cart_checkout.py:161: in test_package_plus_individual assert d["total_price"] == expected, (d["total_price"], expected) E AssertionError: (168000.0, 160000.0) E assert 168000.0 == 160000.0
